betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Red Copper§f

§aAlloy copper with redstone to create a conductive material essential for electronics.§f

§bRed Copper§f (aka Minecraft Grade Copper) is produced in the blast furnace or crucible from copper + redstone. A key alloy alongside steel.

§6Production§f:
§b• Blast Furnace§f: copper + redstone → 2 ingots
§b• Crucible§f: smaller batch production

§6Uses§f:
§b• Red copper wires§f & cables
§b• Advanced Alloy§f (steel + red copper in blast furnace)
§b• Battery sockets§f, capacitors, transformers
§b• Antennas, booster rails

§eTip§f: Redstone is the limiting factor. Bedrock ore processing helps scale up.
